experience.title: Accounting Assistant
bullets: A/R, A/P, COGS, inventory, fixed/intangible assets, close, recs, tax compliance (1120S, CT-3-S/CT-34-SH, 941, NYS-45, FUTA/SUTA)

skills_and_achievements: advanced Excel (VLOOKUP, pivots, Power Pivot); GAAP/ASC, GAAS, SOX; full-cycle GL/A/R/A/P; payroll & quarterly filings; bank/CC/escrow reconciliations; financial statement prep/analysis; sales & payroll tax; drove 10–20% revenue lifts in prior roles.
